postgres_table.name: sales_planning_requirement_salesplanningrequirementrow
postgres_table.refresh_strategy: Replace rows for the company inside a transaction only after SAP procedure succeeds.

columns.business_meaning: Factory company context used to call the SAP HANA procedure.
SAP forecast master AbsID used by the procedure when available.
SAP forecast or planning cycle selected for the refresh.
Planning month/name returned by the procedure or inferred from forecast.
SAP item code for finished goods or BOM-driven component requirement.
Forecasted sales/production planning quantity where the procedure returns it.
Base requirement calculated from forecast and BOM before final stock adjustment.
Minimum stock benchmark to preserve while planning procurement/production.
Current SAP stock quantity in the warehouses used by the procedure.
Final requirement gap after considering planned/base requirement, min stock, and stock in hand.
Open purchase order quantity already covering the requirement where returned.
Requirement still uncovered after subtracting open purchase orders.
SAP report timestamp returned by the procedure, or refresh timestamp fallback.
Original procedure row retained for auditability and future column changes.
